channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. IAF strikes air defense and missile sites in Tehran  The Times of Israel
  3. Middle East war live: Massive explosions heard at Iranian petrochemical zone  france24.com
  4. IDF destroys IRGC Ground Forces base in Tehran, begins striking mobile command centers  The Jerusalem Post
  5. Israel says it has completed strikes on vital targets in Iran  ynetnews

item.title: France's Macron Criticizes Trump and Calls on Allies to Unite Against US - Bloomberg
item.description:
1. France's Macron Criticizes Trump and Calls on Allies to Unite Against US  Bloomberg
  2. Macron Urges Countries Stand Up To U.S. And China As Trump Feud Grows  Forbes
  3. Macron urges world to unite against US dominance  RBC-Ukraine
  4. Macron touts Europe's 'predictability' during Japan visit in apparent swipe at Trump  france24.com
  5. Key Ally Demands New World Order After Trump Mocks His Marriage  The Daily Beast

item.title: Brain scans shed light on how short videos impair memory and alter neural pathways - PsyPost
item.description:
1. Brain scans shed light on how short videos impair memory and alter neural pathways  PsyPost
  2. Stop the brain rot! 12 ways to stay sharp in a mind-frazzling world  The Guardian
  3. I'm a neurologist, and I don't think AI will make people dumber. Here's how to keep your brain sharp.  Business Insider
  4. Your phone could be eating your gray matter and science explains why our brains are shrinking  latination.com
  5. Always online, rarely focused: Is ‘brain rot’ becoming a Saudi problem?  Arab News

item.title: Takeaways from Trump's tough week, as war and gas prices take a toll - NPR
item.description: Takeaways from Trump's tough week, as war and gas prices take a toll  NPRView Full Coverage on Google News
